query: SELECT 'item' as tbl, rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM game_item_catalog GROUP BY rarity UNION ALL SELECT 'equip', rarity, COUNT(*) FROM game_equipment_catalog GROUP BY rarity UNION ALL SELECT 'skill', rarity, COUNT(*) FROM game_unified_skill_catalog GROUP BY rarity;
